title: narcissus albescens
intro: Narcissus albescens, also known as White-flowered Daffodil or White Narcissus, is a perennial plant species in the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its white flowers with yellow centers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Narcissus albescens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
